creator: Torin Redpath | Online Transformation Coach
source_text:
PROTEIN OREO McFLURRY DUPE. 🔥

Happy International Ice Cream Day! 🍦😂

This genuinely tastes like an Oreo McFlurry… but packed with protein 😮‍💨

Big ups to @ninjakitchenau , the Ninja Creami Swirl is one of the best fat loss hacks out there, low calorie protein ice cream, no brainer! 

👨‍🍳 Ingredients (1 serve)

400ml skim milk (I used lactose free)
1 scoop @ghostlifestyle protein (vanilla works too) (Code “TORIN” to save 20%)
30g stevia
1 tsp vanilla bean paste
Pinch of salt
3 Oreos with the cream removed
1 tsp vanilla instant pudding mix

👉 Method

Mix the protein powder, stevia, vanilla bean paste, instant pudding mix and salt together until smooth. I used a milk frother which made it super easy.

Crush the Oreos and stir them through.

Pour into a Ninja Creami container and freeze for 24 hours (8 hours minimum if you’re impatient 😂).

Spin using Soft Gelato Mode.

Dispense using the soft serve part of the Swirl machine (or just enjoy it straight from the tub, it works great either way if you’ve got a regular ninja creami or ice cream maker).

Top with an optional crushed Oreo and enjoy.

📊 Calories & Macros (Entire Pint)

351 Calories 
40g Protein
41g Carbs
3g Fat

—

Quick lesson 👇

One of the biggest reasons people struggle with fat loss is feeling like they have to give up desserts.

You don’t.

Recipes like this let you enjoy that ice cream experience while getting 40g of protein in it.

It’s not about never having the real thing… it’s about having options that make staying on track feel effortless. 🍦🔥
